## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Type

- [ ] Deployment fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Security hardening
- [ ] Driver/configuration update
- [ ] Other

## Validation

- [ ] `docker compose --env-file .env.example config --quiet`
- [ ] Local build or Coolify deploy tested
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Notes

Mention any migration, volume, or environment variable impact.
